Meet Your Doctor

Dr. Niloofa Nazar

A passionate and dedicated Ayurvedic Physician, Dr. Niloofa Nazar founded Sri Natura Ayurveda with a deep commitment to bringing authentic, evidence-based Ayurvedic healing to every patient — with warmth, compassion, and personalized care.

Specializing in women's wellness, skin and hair health, digestive disorders, and pain management, Dr. Niloofa creates individualized treatment plans that address root causes — not just symptoms. Her clinic is a safe, women-friendly environment where patients feel truly heard and cared for.

🌿
100% Natural Treatments

Only authentic herbal medicines and traditional Ayurvedic protocols.

🌸
Women-Friendly Space

A safe, respectful, and empowering environment for all women.

🎯
Personalized Approach

Every treatment plan tailored to your unique body constitution (Prakriti).

🧘
Holistic Healing

Mind, body, and spirit wellness — treating the whole person.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

You can book via the form on this page, WhatsApp us directly at +94 75 386 9295, or call us during clinic hours. After filling the booking form, you'll receive an instant WhatsApp confirmation with all your appointment details.

Yes, absolutely. All treatments at Sri Natura Ayurveda use authentic, natural Ayurvedic herbs, oils, and traditional formulations. We do not use synthetic chemicals or artificial additives in any of our treatments.

Sri Natura Ayurveda is women-friendly but open to all patients. We have a dedicated, respectful, and private environment especially designed to make women feel comfortable and safe during consultations and treatments.

Consultation fees vary depending on the type and duration of treatment. Please contact us via WhatsApp at +94 75 386 9295 or call directly for current fee information. We believe in transparent, fair pricing with no hidden costs.

Initial consultations typically last 45–60 minutes. Follow-up therapy sessions range from 30 to 90 minutes depending on the treatment. Dr. Niloofa will design a treatment plan with frequency and duration tailored to your specific needs.

Yes! WhatsApp booking is available and encouraged. Simply message us at +94 75 386 9295 with your name, preferred treatment, and desired date/time. We'll confirm your slot promptly.

The number of sessions varies by condition severity and individual response. Some patients see significant improvement in 4–6 sessions; chronic conditions may require ongoing treatment. Dr. Niloofa will provide a realistic timeline during your initial consultation.
